title: Corrigendum: Similarity degree of Fourier algebras
author_string: Hun Hee Lee, Ebrahim Samei, Nico Spronk
abstract: We address two errors made in our paper arXiv:1511.03423. The most significant error is in Theorem 1.1. We repair this error, and show that the main result, Theorem 2.5 of arXiv:1511.03423, is true. The second error is in one of our examples, Remark 2.4 (iv), and we partially resolve it.
